claimLimitations: A future reviewed release must retain exact chart, source, rights, and activation identity.
No chart bytes may affect production output.
Cache identity must match the exact YAML bytes; no stale fallback may add guidance.
Legacy records remain inspectable but cannot become canonical activation authority.
The legacy reviewed flag is not an ADR 0022 attestation or activation decision.
A personal default cannot grant historical, pedagogical, or specialist authority.
Evaluator-side learning can create only an inactive candidate through the explicit Owner-reviewed production bridge; activation remains a separate Owner approval.
Owner-local choices affect only the Owner-local guidance lane.
Dispatch selects a maintained projection from explicit target state; it does not establish historical or idiomatic authority.
The production route must cross the observation-only authority guard before reading arrangement state or compiling.
Maintained layout defaults are editorial, not historical-practice evidence.
Filesystem, network, and resource isolation constrain execution only; they supply no bibliographic, extraction, musical, historical, specialist, or activation authority.
Trusted absolute resolution and a minimal environment prevent runtime environment substitution but do not pin executable bytes or certify tool output.
Compiler selection and validation determine executable output acceptance but confer no historical or idiomatic authority.
Deterministic projection does not claim idiomatic or historical suitability.
Synthesized preview does not establish performance-practice or human-playability claims.
Classification metadata cannot authorize musical behavior or certify manifest completeness.
The pinned builder and an independent validator remain separate trust inputs.
Credential bytes are operational authentication state, not musical or knowledge authority; write and delete methods consume this security boundary but do not produce authority outputs.
The fixed Keychain boundary prevents ambient executable substitution and credential exfiltration; it does not attest the identity or behavior of a connected model provider.
Complete manifest resolution and activation remain unavailable until the later resolver cutover.
The guard validates only frozen T08 classification and grants no musical or knowledge authority.
Recovery can restore visibility of already persisted, schema-valid records; it cannot create musical evidence or authorize knowledge.
The legacy loader returns no active packs.
The self-declared reviewed field is not release or activation authority.
Fallback parameters cannot masquerade as Owner intent or reviewed idiom.
Retry policy may stop or guide compilation recovery but cannot establish musical or historical correctness.
Key-based diapason suggestions are software defaults, not claims of universal historical practice.
Model-proposed intent remains a proposal until accepted through the Owner boundary.
Owner edits and intent govern the Owner's requested output but do not grant historical authority.
Default synthesized playback is not evidence of historical performance practice.
Playback interpretation is Owner-local and does not alter the canonical arrangement score.
A missing upload assertion defaults to rights unknown and never supplies positive use or redistribution authority.
Labels present persisted state and cannot upgrade its authority.
Mechanical and guidance fields are deliberately separate inventory entries.
Profile prose and constraints cannot grant historical or pedagogical precedence.
Unmeasured geometry, comfort, reliability, and historical authenticity remain unknown.
An exact byte and page-count tuple selects only a maintainer-reviewed software profile; a match does not establish bibliographic identity or extraction correctness.
The routed profile remains candidate input and conveys no historical, specialist, Owner-review, activation, release, or publication authority.
Examples are workflow illustrations, not evidence of historical correctness.
Quarantined alfabeto data remains unavailable.
Compatibility behavior only until the complete manifest cutover.
Must not be presented as historical-practice or specialist-reviewed authority.
Provider output remains bounded by the Model Action commit and review contract.
The system prompt is a software policy, not specialist or historical authority.
Current scoring is not a source-backed realization profile.
Suggested keys rank convenience only and do not prove playability or historical idiom.
Assignment ranking is not evidence of a historical intabulation school.
Shared search weights are software heuristics, not target-specific idiom authority.
Three target families remain independent evaluation subjects.
Selection precedence cannot confer authority on a profile or pack.
Tool wording and defaults do not establish historical authority.
The production path may return only a structured denial until an exact reviewed chart release exists; it cannot expose or activate legacy chart bytes.
The card reports deterministic software checks over recorded lineage; it cannot establish historical correctness, player comfort, or independent musical quality.
A stable content digest proves byte-equivalent canonical record identity only; it grants no musical, historical, or reviewer authority.
Default thresholds cannot establish player-specific comfort or reliability.

Evaluation runner attribution covers evaluator records produced through EvaluationHarness; transient canonical-workspace writes remain attributed to the guarded production writer boundaries each runner invokes.
Evaluator logic cannot feed production generation or candidate ranking directly.

The sole current evaluator-to-production transition is the explicit Owner-reviewed Personal Default Candidate bridge; it cannot activate a default and independently validates the Owner review boundary.
Mechanically possible does not mean comfortable, idiomatic, or historically supported.
Atomic publication preserves decision integrity but does not create epistemic authority.
The generic production mutation route remains disabled unless explicitly injected.
Legacy flat-file canonicality labels deny canonical status but cannot establish positive musical or historical authority.
Digesting and listing quarantined packs does not activate them or confer reviewed historical authority.
A committed provider result remains software output and cannot self-attest historical claims.
Provider authorization does not authorize tools, source egress, or activation consequences.
Inferred labels are software outputs until supported by explicit reviewed evidence.
Readiness labels summarize exact scoped Owner evidence and cannot upgrade its role, scope, or authority.
The production path must cross the observation-only authority guard before reading evidence or persisting a playtest.
Editorial preservation policy remains distinct from source historical authority.

Page Atlas workflows stage non-authoritative candidates and citation lineage only; parser output and source-profile routing cannot supply bibliographic, extraction, historical, specialist, or activation authority.
Reference identity and storage integrity remain distinct from historical-practice review.
Rights and lifecycle policy can deny use but cannot supply positive musical authority.
Graph validity and test-only attestations do not create epistemic, activation, or historical-practice authority.
Pack-citation rights verification is exact-operation and as-of scoped; it does not grant reusable, human, or broader publication authority.
Confidence and inferred voices remain reviewable evidence, never documentary authority.

Page enumeration, geometry parsing, component-version observation, and rasterization describe bounded tool output only; they establish no source identity, extraction truth, citation authority, or musical interpretation.
Syntactic normalization does not establish documentary identity or resolve ambiguous notation.
Theory operations are deterministic software interpretations and do not establish source truth or historical practice.
Aliases and defaults validate provider output but confer no documentary or musicological authority.
Authorization can deny an operation but cannot supply missing rights evidence or musical authority.
